title: Beldray BEL01480-150 Steam Iron - Dual Precision Ceramic Tip Soleplate, Smooth Glide, 230ml Water Tank, Spray Function, Anti-Calc & Drip, 2200W, Adjustable Temperature Control, Self-Cleaning Function
features: Boasting a high-powered performance, this Beldray Duo Glide steam iron is complete with an easy-to-use temperature control function
Helping to tackle the toughest of creases, the white gold ceramic-coated iron features a continuous steam function and 2200-watt power
Perfect for busy households, this Beldray iron is fitted with a dual precision tip soleplate, making it easy to get in-between buttons
Complete with an anti-drip feature, this stylish steam iron is built with a 19m cord and includes a high-performing water spray addition
Perfect for curtains and other hanging garments, use the steam burst setting for effortless vertical steaming and crease-free results
This product comes with a free one-year manufacturer guarantee Please register online within 30 days of purchase to be eligible for a 2-year extended cover
description: Product Description Beldray 240ml Duo Glide Steam Iron Celebrating 150 years of Beldray, this 2200 Watt Duo Glide steam iron will effortlessly remove unwanted stubborn creases, perfect for keeping clothes looking fresh and neat. Producing outstanding results, this electric iron boasts an anti-drip feature which will leave garments looking spot-free and ready to wear. With a powerful 100 g/min steam shot, this easy-grip iron has a powerful vertical steam burst with an easy press between buttons and edges, promising maximum comfort whilst ironing. A name started almost by accident... As Walter Bradley watched his sons playing with their alphabet bricks, the boys proudly attempted to spell the Bradley name. Instead, they stumbled across the brand we all love today, Beldray. 150 years later, that name can be seen across our entire product range, in homes up and down the country and beyond.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti-Calc Function, Anti-Drip, Dual Soleplate Technology, Even Heat Distribution, Lightweight, Precision Tip, Self-Cleaning, Temperature Control, Water Spray Function
